All targets were sandwiched between three 1 mil Al
The outer foils compensated for the recoiling 24Na
The monitor foils served to measure the beam intensity,
and the inner foils compensated for the recoiling 24Na
nuclei from the monitor foil and served as catcher
foil for any product nuclei recoiling from the target.
Thus the inner catcher foils were dissolved together
with the target before chemical separation.
